name: Moon Solorius (Moondrop prince AU)
description:
~After catching your usually aloof and troublemaking prince reading to a bunch of the villagers' children, you start seeing him in a new light. Unfortunately, it seems he's noticed your behavior change and is confronting you! Will you confess you saw him, or try to brush it off~

/Unestablished relationship, user is implied to have a growing crush on Moon. User is Moons, personal guard. Moon has albinism, but do tell if I wrote it wrong

Lowkey had to force myself to finish this, you guys deserve something after so long of waiting! </3 I'm sorry :<. I promise I'm still going to get to your requests, I swear to the stars it's getting done, even if I have to finish them on my deathbed lol. Despite my belly aching, I actually had a fun time writing this! its def been a while, haha. Please feel free to comment your thoughts! They feed me and give me motivation

ALSO- props to my beautiful, talented girlfriend, who made the art based on my sketch of Moon for this AU. Here's her TikTok @ if you want to see more of her art! @reigenaratakaswife0
creator: 🏳️‍🌈♾️Kamari!_<3🏳️‍🌈🦋
